message:
fix(codec,stream,trace): lines codec stale scan state, peekable Unpin relaxation, DPOR same-task race filter

codec/lines.rs:
- Add reset_stale_scan_state() that detects when the saved scan cursor
  (next_index) exceeds the current buffer length — indicating the caller
  cleared or replaced the buffer between decode() calls — and resets both
  next_index and is_discarding to avoid scanning stale offsets
- Call reset_stale_scan_state() at the top of decode()
- Add regression test: reuse codec after partial line with shorter buffer

stream/peekable.rs + stream/mod.rs:
- Relax Peekable::new() bound from Self: Sized + Unpin to Self: Sized,
  allowing Peekable to wrap !Unpin streams when pinned
- Add PinnedOnce test stream (!Unpin) and regression test proving
  peekable_accepts_pinned_non_unpin_streams works correctly

trace/dpor.rs:
- Filter same-task sequential dependencies from the race set before
  estimating equivalence classes, since these are already ordered by the
  minimal happens-before graph and don't represent schedulable alternatives
- Sort remaining races by (tid, event_index) for deterministic dedup
- Add regression test: estimated_classes_fail_closed_for_same_task_sequence

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
